product_overview: A web app that lets users track personal expenses with fast manual entry, budgets, analytics and an OCR-powered receipt scanner using OpenAI GPT-4o to auto-extract expense data from images.
core_goals: Enable fast expense capture (manual or via OCR) to reduce friction and increase logging frequency
Provide clear monthly analytics and budget alerts so users can monitor and control spending
Offer category management and CSV export for flexible organization and data portability
Support basic admin capabilities to view and manage user accounts

features.name: User Registration
features.description: Allow a new user to create an account with name, email and password and be redirected to their dashboard.
user_flows: Navigate to /register -> Fill name input field -> Fill email input field -> Fill password input field (min 6 characters) -> Click Crear cuenta button to submit -> Redirect to /dashboard -> See dashboard loaded

Navigate to /register -> Fill name input field -> Fill email input field with an already-registered email -> Fill password input field -> Click Crear cuenta button to submit -> See error message if email already exists -> Stay on /register

features.name: User Login
features.description: Authenticate existing users with email and password and grant access to the dashboard.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill email input field -> Fill password input field -> Click Iniciar sesión button to submit -> Redirect to /dashboard -> See dashboard loaded

Navigate to /login -> Fill email input field -> Fill password input field with incorrect password -> Click Iniciar sesión button to submit -> See error message on invalid credentials -> Stay on /login

features.name: Dashboard Analytics
features.description: Display monthly financial summary, charts, trend metrics and navigation between time ranges and analysis tabs.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> See total expenses for current month displayed -> Switch between Diario, Semanal, Categorias and Transacciones tabs -> Hover over chart bars to see daily/weekly breakdown -> Click month left arrow to view previous month -> See updated summary and charts
Navigate to /dashboard without a valid session -> Be redirected to /login -> See message prompting to sign in

features.name: Expense Management
features.description: Create, edit, delete and filter personal expenses, with optional AI-assisted categorization.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/expenses -> Click Nuevo Gasto button to open create form -> Fill description input field -> Fill amount input field -> Fill date input field -> Select category from dropdown -> Click submit to create expense -> See new expense listed in the expenses table

Navigate to /dashboard/expenses -> Click Nuevo Gasto button to open create form -> Fill description input field -> Fill amount input field with non-numeric or empty value -> Click submit to create expense -> See validation error message about amount -> Remain in create form

Navigate to /dashboard/expenses -> Click Nuevo Gasto button to open create form -> Fill description input field -> Click AI categorize button to auto-suggest a category -> See suggested category -> Accept suggested category -> Click submit to create expense -> See expense created with suggested category

features.name: Receipt OCR Scanner
features.description: Upload a receipt image to extract amount, description, category and date using GPT-4o Vision and prefill a saveable expense form.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/scan -> Drag and drop an image file or click to upload -> See preview of uploaded image -> Click Escanear Recibo button to process image -> See extracted amount, description, category and date shown in prefilled form -> Edit any field as needed -> Click Save expense -> Redirect to /dashboard/expenses -> See saved expense with receipt image

Navigate to /dashboard/scan -> Upload a non-image or corrupted file -> Click Escanear Recibo button to process image -> See OCR processing error message or file validation error -> Option to retry upload

features.name: Budget Management
features.description: Set and track monthly budgets per category with visual progress and alert thresholds.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/budgets -> View list of categories with current budget amounts and progress bars -> Click edit on a category budget -> Fill new budget amount -> Click Save -> See updated progress bar indicating budget usage percentage -> If usage > 80% see alert indicator
Navigate to /dashboard/budgets -> Click edit on a category budget -> Enter a negative or invalid amount -> Click Save -> See validation error message and do not save invalid budget

features.name: Category Management
features.description: Create, edit and delete expense categories with custom icons and colors for organizing expenses and OCR suggestions.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/categories -> Click Nueva Categoría button to open create form -> Fill category name input field -> Select icon -> Select color -> Click submit to create category -> See new category appear in the list

Navigate to /dashboard/categories -> Click Nueva Categoría button to open create form -> Fill category name input field with a name that already exists -> Click submit to create category -> See error message about duplicate category name -> Remain on create form

features.name: CSV Export
features.description: Download a CSV file containing expenses filtered by month and year for offline use or import elsewhere.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/export -> Select month from dropdown -> Select year from dropdown -> Click Exportar CSV button to download file -> Browser downloads CSV file -> Open CSV and see expenses for selected month/year

Navigate to /dashboard/export -> Select month and year that have no expenses -> Click Exportar CSV button to download file -> See message indicating no expenses for the selected range or receive an empty CSV file

features.name: Users Admin Panel
features.description: Admin-style view listing registered users and their expense counts with basic edit and delete operations.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/users -> See list of all users with name, email and expense count -> Click a user entry to edit name or email -> Make changes and click Save -> See updated user information in the list
Navigate to /dashboard/users -> Click delete on a user entry -> Confirm delete action -> If server returns an error see delete failure message -> User remains in the list

tech_stack.other: Prisma ORM v6, PostgreSQL, NextAuth v5, OpenAI API, Cloudinary, bcryptjs, date-fns

routes.description: Landing page with hero, features showcase, how it works and testimonials
User login page with email and password
User registration page with name, email, and password
Main dashboard with financial summary, charts and recent transactions
Expense list with create, edit, delete and AI auto-categorization
Receipt scanner using GPT-4o Vision OCR to extract expense data
Monthly budget management per category with alert thresholds
Manage expense categories with custom icons and colors
Export expenses as CSV filtered by month and year
Admin panel listing all users with their expense counts

features.name: User Registration
features.description: Create a new account with name, email and password
user_interactions: Fill name input field
Fill email input field
Fill password input field (min 6 characters)
Click Crear cuenta button to submit
See error message if email already exists
Redirect to dashboard on success

features.name: User Login
features.description: Authenticate with email and password credentials
user_interactions: Fill email input field
Fill password input field
Click Iniciar sesión button to submit
See error message on invalid credentials
Redirect to dashboard on success

features.name: Dashboard Analytics
features.description: View financial summary with charts, trends and statistics
user_interactions: View total expenses for current month
Navigate between months using arrow buttons
Switch between Diario, Semanal, Categorias and Transacciones tabs
Hover over chart bars to see daily/weekly breakdown

features.name: Expense Management
features.description: Create, edit and delete personal expenses with optional AI categorization
user_interactions: Click Nuevo Gasto button to open create form
Fill description, amount, date and category fields
Click AI categorize button to auto-suggest a category
Submit form to create expense
Click edit icon on existing expense to modify it
Click delete icon on existing expense to remove it
Filter expenses by category using dropdown

features.name: Receipt OCR Scanner
features.description: Upload a receipt image and extract expense data using GPT-4o Vision
user_interactions: Drag and drop an image or click to upload
Click Escanear Recibo button to process image
View extracted amount, description, category and date
Confirm or edit extracted data
Save expense from scanned data

features.name: Budget Management
features.description: Set and track monthly budgets per expense category
user_interactions: View list of categories with current budget amounts
Click edit on a category budget to set a new amount
See progress bar indicating budget usage percentage
See alert indicator when spending exceeds 80% of budget

features.name: Category Management
features.description: Create, edit and delete expense categories with icons and colors
user_interactions: Click Nueva Categoría button to open create form
Fill category name, select icon and color
Submit form to create category
Click edit icon to update an existing category
Click delete icon to remove a category

features.name: CSV Export
features.description: Download expenses as a CSV file filtered by month and year
user_interactions: Select month and year from dropdowns
Click Exportar CSV button to download file

features.name: Users Admin Panel
features.description: Admin view listing all registered users and their expense counts
user_interactions: View list of all users with name, email and expense count

known_limitations.issue: Search box in dashboard header is UI-only, not connected to any API
known_limitations.impact: Search does not filter or return results

known_limitations.issue: Notification bell is cosmetic only, no backend implementation
Categories API endpoints do not enforce auth on POST
known_limitations.impact: Anyone can create categories without being logged in

known_limitations.issue: Users admin endpoint lists all users without admin role check
known_limitations.impact: Any authenticated user can access the users list

known_limitations.issue: Budget alerts only display on dashboard, no email notifications
known_limitations.impact: Users must manually check the dashboard to notice budget overruns
